summary: The entrance hall is decorated to a modern standard with off-white to light grey emulsioned walls, white wood trims, and light oak-effect engineered wood flooring. The walls exhibit widespread light scuffs and grey rub marks at mid to low level, indicating general wear. Fixtures including the smart touchscreen panel, stylish dark bronze switches, and the walnut veneer entrance door are otherwise in functional and good condition.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Flat plaster ceiling, painted in matt white emulsion.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Plaster walls, painted in a light grey/off-white emulsion.
defects: Multiple light grey rub marks and scuffs at knee level on corner wall (P061, P062)
Scuff marks and localized rub marks at waist level below the wall-mounted screen (P068, P069)
Scuffs and dark rub marks above the skirting board level (P070, P071)

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Light oak-effect engineered wood or laminate flooring planks.

items.name: Skirting Boards
items.description: Wooden profile skirting boards, painted in satin white.
defects: Minor light dust accumulation to top edges.

items.name: Front Entrance Door
items.description: Heavy timber-core front door with a rich walnut wood veneer, featuring a dark metal side trim, bronze lever handle, thumbturn, and a matching letterbox slot.
defects: Minor surface-level scratches on the inside latch plate and lock housing (P075).
Very faint tarnish on the bronze letterbox flap (P074).

items.name: Door Frame and Architrave
items.description: White-painted timber architrave on the interior side, transitioning to a dark brown metal frame on the exterior side.

items.name: Marble Threshold Strip
items.description: Polished grey and white marble threshold plate under the front door, incorporating a small circular brass flat number plate showing '20'.

items.name: Cupboard Door
items.description: Single floor-to-ceiling flush timber utility cupboard door, painted in off-white.
defects: Chip and paint loss to the leading edge of the door panel at mid-level (P083).

items.name: Cupboard Interior
items.description: Built-in closet space with a walnut-fronted shelf divider, black metal hanging clothes hangers, integrated LED strip light, ceiling loft access hatch, and light oak floorboards.
defects: A cluster of dark dots and light grey scrape marks on the rear interior wall above the hanger rail level (P086).

items.name: Touchscreen Control Panel / Smart Thermostat
items.description: Wall-mounted smart home touchscreen panel in a black bezel.
defects: Slight fingerprint smudges on screen surface.

items.name: Light Switches
items.description: Dark bronze/brushed metal light switch plates, including one 4-gang plate and two single-gang plates.

items.name: Sockets
items.description: Dark bronze/brushed metal double power sockets.

items.name: Smoke Alarm
items.description: Ceiling-mounted circular white plastic smoke alarm.

items.name: Floor-Standing Mirror
items.description: Tall rectangular mirror with a minimal black metal frame, leaning against the hallway wall.
